args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Updated python script to print all non-ASCII character occurrences in the extracted file."}
args.CodeContent:
"with open("SettingsPortal.tsx.extracted", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    for idx, line in enumerate(f):
        non_ascii = [c for c in line if ord(c) > 127]
        if non_ascii:
            print(f"Line {idx}: {''.join(non_ascii[:30])} (total {len(non_ascii)})")
            print(f"  Full line: {line.strip()[:100]}")
"
args.Description: "Update ASCII checker to list all non-ASCII occurrences."
